job_description:
AI Developer

Company: Inspite Technologies Location: Infopark, Kochi Experience: 1–2 Years Employment Type: Full-Time Salary: Based on Experience Immediate Joining Preferred Freshers Can Apply

About the Role

Inspite Technologies is seeking a passionate and skilled AI Developer to join their development team. The ideal candidate should have an interest in Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Generative AI, and API integration. Fresh graduates with strong technical knowledge and a willingness to learn are encouraged to apply.

Key Responsibilities

  • Develop and implement AI and Machine Learning solutions.
  • Build and integrate AI-powered applications and services.
  • Work with Large Language Models (LLMs), Generative AI technologies, and Computer Vision solutions.
  • Develop and integrate RESTful APIs and AI services.
  • Analyze datasets and prepare data for AI model training and evaluation.
  • Collaborate with development teams to integrate AI features into applications.
  • Debug, troubleshoot, and optimize AI applications and workflows.
  • Participate in solution design, development, testing, and deployment.
  • Stay updated with the latest AI, Machine Learning, and Generative AI trends and technologies.

Required Skills & Qualifications

  • Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, IT, or related field.
  • Candidates with 1–2 years of experience or freshers can apply.
  • Proficiency in Python programming.
  • Understanding of Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence concepts.
  • Familiarity with AI frameworks like TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn, or similar.
  • Knowledge of REST APIs, HTTP, and JSON.
  • Basic understanding of databases and data handling.
  • Experience with Git and version control systems.
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
  • Ability to learn new technologies quickly and work collaboratively.

Soft Skills

  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
  • Strong problem-solving and analytical thinking.
  • Fast learner with attention to detail.
  • Ability to manage multiple tasks and deadlines efficiently.

Why Join Us?

  • Opportunity to work on cutting-edge AI and Generative AI projects.
  • Friendly and collaborative work environment.
  • Exposure to real-time projects and modern technologies.
  • Career growth opportunities in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning.

Apply Now

If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at hr@inspitetech.com.
summary: Inspite Technologies seeks an AI Developer in Kochi with 1–2 years of experience to build AI solutions using Python, TensorFlow, and REST APIs. Freshers with strong technical skills and a degree in Computer Science or related fields are encouraged to apply.

job_description:
Position: Performance Marketing Manager Experience: 2+ Years Location: [Location] Employment Type: Full-Time

About the Role

We are seeking a results-driven Performance Marketing Manager to plan, execute, and optimize digital marketing campaigns across multiple platforms. The ideal candidate should have strong expertise in paid advertising, lead generation, campaign optimization, analytics, and conversion tracking to drive business growth and achieve marketing objectives.

Key Responsibilities

  • Plan, manage, and optimize paid advertising campaigns across Google Ads, Meta Ads (Facebook & Instagram), LinkedIn Ads, and other digital platforms.
  • Develop and execute lead generation, brand awareness, and conversion-focused campaigns.
  • Monitor campaign performance and continuously optimize for ROI, ROAS, CPC, CPL, and CPA.
  • Conduct keyword research, audience targeting, and competitor analysis.
  • Set up and manage tracking tools such as Google Analytics, Google Tag Manager, Meta Pixel, and conversion tracking.
  • Analyze campaign data and prepare detailed performance reports.
  • Manage marketing budgets and allocate spend effectively across channels.
  • Perform A/B testing for ad creatives, landing pages, and audience segments.
  • Collaborate with the creative, content, and web development teams to improve campaign performance.
  • Stay updated with the latest digital marketing trends, tools, and platform updates.
  • Generate quality leads and contribute to sales growth through performance-driven strategies.

Required Skills

  • Strong knowledge of Google Ads, Meta Ads Manager, LinkedIn Ads, and YouTube Ads.
  • Experience with Google Analytics (GA4), Google Tag Manager, Search Console, and Looker Studio.
  • Understanding of SEO, landing page optimization, and conversion rate optimization (CRO).
  • Expertise in audience segmentation, remarketing, and funnel optimization.
  • Strong analytical and reporting skills.
  • Excellent communication and team management abilities.
  • Ability to manage multiple projects and clients simultaneously.

Qualifications

  • Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Business Administration, or a related field.
  • 2+ years of hands-on experience in Performance Marketing/Digital Marketing.
  • Google Ads and Meta certifications will be an added advantage.

Preferred Skills

  • Experience in handling e-commerce and lead generation campaigns.
  • Knowledge of CRM tools and marketing automation platforms.
  • Basic understanding of HTML, WordPress, and landing page builders.

What We Offer

  • Competitive salary package.
  • Career growth opportunities.
  • Collaborative and innovative work environment.
  • Exposure to diverse industry projects and clients.

Apply with your CV to: hr@inspitetech.com
summary: A Performance Marketing Manager is needed to optimize digital campaigns across Google, Meta, and LinkedIn. The role focuses on driving ROI through data-driven strategies and cross-team collaboration.

job_description:

Consolidate enquiry data for reporting, upload to dashboards, and resolve discrepancies with the data analytics team. Ensure CRM data is updated and consistent with enquiry reports and business tracking systems.

job_description:
Job Title: Business Analyst / Assoc. Project Manager

Position Overview: We are seeking a highly motivated and detail-oriented Business Analyst to join our team. The role involves working with stakeholders to clarify business needs, translating them into actionable development requirements, and ensuring timely delivery.

Key Responsibilities: - Engage with stakeholders to understand and document business needs and requirements. - Maintain and prioritize requirements backlog in collaboration with stakeholders. - Translate business requirements into detailed user stories and acceptance criteria. - Ensure the engineering team clearly understands requirements and acceptance criteria. - Act as the primary point of contact for requirement clarifications and delivery coordination. - Plan, manage, and track project timelines, deliverables, and milestones. - Coordinate and facilitate regular project meetings, including sprint planning, daily stand-ups, and retrospectives. - Identify and mitigate project risks and issues. - Communicate project status and updates to stakeholders regularly. - Ensure projects are delivered on time and within scope. - Define user acceptance criteria and collaborate with QA teams to ensure thorough testing and quality assurance processes. - Continuously seek opportunities to improve processes and efficiency.

Qualifications: - Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Business, or related field. - 4-6 years of relevant experience is mandatory. - Proven experience as a Business Analyst, Project Manager, or similar role in a software development environment. - Strong understanding of Agile methodologies and Scrum framework. - Excellent communication, presentation, and interpersonal skills. - Ability to think from an end-user perspective and translate business needs into actionable requirements. - Strong organizational and prioritization skills, with a proactive, solution-oriented mindset. - Experience with project management tools (e.g., Jira, Trello, Asana).

Preferred Skills: - Experience in a small or startup environment. - Technical background or understanding of software development processes.

Contact: If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at daya.m@cloudium.io.
summary: Business Analyst/Assoc. Project Manager translates business needs into development requirements and manages project timelines. Requires 4-6 years of experience with Agile and project management tools.

job_description:
Cloud AI Architect

Core Cloud & Infrastructure Requirements

  • Hands-on AWS architecture: EKS/ECS, VPC, IAM, S3, SQS/SNS, CloudWatch (must have deployed, not just certified)
  • Infrastructure as Code: Terraform or AWS CDK (not click-ops)
  • Container orchestration: Kubernetes or ECS, auto-scaling (HPA/KEDA), service mesh
  • API gateway / reverse proxy design: routing, rate limiting, authentication, audit logging
  • CI/CD pipelines: end-to-end, automated (not manual deploys)
  • Microservices architecture: event-driven, queue-based decoupling, independent scaling
  • Networking and security: VPCs, security groups, encryption at rest/in transit, secrets management
  • Cost management: FinOps thinking, right-sizing, spot vs on-demand decisions

AI Workload Awareness

  • LLM API patterns: token-based billing, streaming responses, caching strategies, model routing
  • GPU instance management: for hosting open-source models or fine-tuning (instance types, scheduling, utilization)
  • AI-specific tooling: model serving (Triton, vLLM, TGI), vector databases, embedding pipelines
  • AI output monitoring: non-deterministic outputs require distinct monitoring/testing strategies
  • Open-source integration: OCR, NLP, document processing tools in production systems

Operational Mindset

  • Prioritizes system reliability over accuracy: "what happens when this breaks?"
  • Designs for operability: systems must be maintainable/debuggable at 2am
  • First-class monitoring/alerting/reliability considerations
  • Experience in regulated environments (life sciences): audit trails, access controls, data governance

Contact: Share your resume at hr@simelabs.com
summary: Cloud AI Architect required for AWS infrastructure and AI workload design, with operational reliability focus in regulated environments.

job_description:
Agentic AI Architect

Key Responsibilities

Agent Design & Architecture: - Architect multi-agent systems using appropriate orchestration patterns (planner-solver, autonomous teams, goal decomposition, tool-use chains) selected based on the problem, not the framework. - Design memory architectures for agent interaction, coordination, and context persistence (short-term, long-term, episodic). - Build reusable tooling, APIs, and interfaces for agent orchestration that clients can extend and maintain. - Evaluate and select LLMs (commercial and open-source), vector databases, and retrieval systems based on client requirements, cost, and performance.

Production Deployment & Operations (Non-Negotiable): - Deploy agentic AI systems in cloud-native environments (AWS, GCP, Azure) — containerized, auto-scaling, monitored. - Design and implement agent versioning, rollback, and A/B testing strategies — agents in production must be operable. - Build evaluation and quality monitoring systems for agent outputs — regression testing, quality scoring, continuous validation. - Implement observability for agent workflows — tracing, logging, cost tracking, latency monitoring across multi-step agent chains. - Design guardrails, safety mechanisms, and compliance controls appropriate to the client’s industry.

Client Engagement: - Translate client business requirements into agent-based technical solutions. - Lead architectural discussions, PoCs, and hands-on development. - Guide client teams in adopting agent frameworks, best practices, and operational standards. - Provide clear documentation, runbooks, and handoff materials.

Must-Have Skills

Agentic AI & LLM Systems: - 2+ years hands-on experience designing and deploying multi-agent systems. - Strong understanding of agent orchestration patterns — not just framework usage, but understanding why and when to use each pattern. - Proficiency with LLM APIs, RAG architectures, vector stores, tool use, and chaining logic. - Hands-on experience with both commercial (GPT-4, Claude, Gemini) and open-source LLMs (Mistral, LLaMA, etc.). - Prompt engineering, model selection trade-offs, and context window management. - Model-cost profiling and budgeting — API call optimization, caching strategies, batch vs streaming decisions.

Production & Cloud (Non-Negotiable): - Experience deploying AI systems in cloud-native environments — not just prototyping, but production deployment with monitoring. - Container orchestration (Kubernetes/ECS), auto-scaling strategies, and infrastructure-as-code. - CI/CD pipelines for AI systems — automated testing, deployment, and rollback. - Observability — distributed tracing, logging, alerting for multi-step agent workflows. - Agent versioning and rollout strategies — the ability to update agents in production without breaking things.

Engineering Foundation: - Strong Python development skills. - API design and microservices architecture. - Experience with vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, FAISS, Qdrant, or equivalent). - Familiarity with agent orchestration frameworks (LangChain, LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen, Haystack, or equivalent) — but understanding the patterns matters more than knowing every framework.

Operational Mindset: - Designs for reliability and operability, not just functionality. - Thinks about monitoring, cost, and failure modes from day one. - Can articulate what happens when an agent fails, hallucinates, or degrades — and has strategies for each.

Contact: If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at hr@simelabs.com.
summary: Design and deploy multi-agent AI systems with cloud-native production operations, LLM orchestration, and client-focused technical solutions.

job_description:
Mobile QA Automation Engineer — Android

We are seeking a skilled Android QA Automation Engineer to join our mobile engineering team and ensure the quality, reliability, and scalability of our Android applications. The ideal candidate has strong experience building and maintaining automated test frameworks covering Unit Tests, Integration Tests, UI Tests, and End-to-End (E2E) Tests. You should also have a deep understanding of Android architecture, modularization, CI/CD pipelines, and debugging complex mobile systems.

Responsibilities

Android Test Automation - Design, develop, and maintain Android automation frameworks. - Implement and maintain: - Unit Tests - Integration Tests - UI Tests - End-to-End (E2E) Tests - Improve test reliability and reduce flaky tests. - Analyze automation failures and debug unstable test behaviors.

Architecture & Quality Engineering - Understand Android application architecture and source code structure. - Evaluate and improve application testability. - Work with: - MVVM - Clean Architecture - Modular Architecture - Understand advantages and limitations of each architecture from a testing perspective.

Android Automation Development - Develop automated tests using: - Kotlin - Espresso - UI Automator - Robolectric - Work with multi-module Android projects. - Configure and maintain Gradle-based testing environments. - Validate application behavior across: - Emulators - Real devices - Different Android OS versions

CI/CD & Infrastructure - Integrate automation into CI/CD pipelines. - Maintain test execution pipelines using: - Bitrise CI - Optimize build and test execution performance.

Mocking & Backend Validation - Create mock data and backend simulation strategies. - Handle inconsistent backend data and unstable environments. - Validate GraphQL API-driven application flows. - Support offline and unstable-network testing scenarios.

Collaboration & Debugging - Investigate crashes, flaky tests, and unstable environments. - Define testing strategies when onboarding into legacy or unstable projects. - Collaborate with developers to identify root causes of failures. - Participate in code reviews and testing architecture discussions.

Required Skills

Core Android Skills - Strong experience with: - Kotlin - Gradle - Espresso - UI Automator - Robolectric

Android Architecture - Strong understanding of: - MVVM - Clean Architecture - Modular Architecture - Dependency Injection

Testing Expertise - Deep understanding of: - Unit Testing - Integration Testing - UI Testing - E2E Testing - Experience debugging flaky tests and asynchronous behaviors.

CI/CD & Tools - Experience with: - Bitrise CI - GraphQL - MockingJay or equivalent mocking frameworks

Nice-to-Have

  • Experience with large-scale Android applications
  • Experience with performance testing
  • Knowledge of accessibility testing
  • Experience with cloud device farms

Contact: If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at hr@simelabs.com.
summary: Android QA Automation Engineer ensures app quality through test frameworks, CI/CD integration, and collaboration with engineering teams to optimize reliability and stability.

job_description:
Mobile QA Automation Engineer — iOS

We are seeking a skilled iOS QA Automation Engineer to join our mobile engineering team and ensure the quality, stability, and scalability of our iOS applications. The ideal candidate has strong experience building and maintaining automated test solutions for Unit Tests, Integration Tests, UI Tests, and End-to-End (E2E) Tests. You should also have a deep understanding of iOS architecture, automation frameworks, CI/CD pipelines, and debugging complex mobile systems.

Responsibilities

  • iOS Test Automation: Design, develop, and maintain iOS automation frameworks. Implement and maintain Unit Tests, Integration Tests, UI Tests, and End-to-End (E2E) Tests. Improve automation reliability and reduce flaky tests. Analyze unstable test behaviors and automation failures.
  • Architecture & Quality Engineering: Understand iOS application architecture and source code structure. Evaluate and improve application testability. Work with MVVM, Clean Architecture, and Modular architectures. Understand the impact of architecture on automation testing.
  • iOS Automation Development: Develop automated tests using Swift, XCTest, XCUITest, and EarlGrey. Execute and maintain automation workflows using Xcodebuild and Tuist. Validate application behavior across simulators, real devices, and different iOS versions.
  • CI/CD & Infrastructure: Integrate automation into CI/CD pipelines. Maintain mobile testing workflows using Bitrise CI. Optimize build and automation execution performance.
  • Mocking & Backend Validation: Implement mock data strategies and API simulation. Handle inconsistent backend data and unstable test environments. Validate GraphQL-driven application flows. Support offline and poor-network-condition testing.
  • Collaboration & Debugging: Investigate crashes, flaky tests, and unstable environments. Define testing approaches when joining large or unstable projects. Collaborate with developers to identify root causes of issues. Participate in code reviews and automation architecture discussions.

Required Skills

  • Core iOS Skills: Strong experience with Swift, XCTest, XCUITest, EarlGrey, Xcodebuild, and Tuist.
  • iOS Architecture: Strong understanding of MVVM, Clean Architecture, Dependency Injection, and Scalable iOS architectures.
  • Testing Expertise: Deep understanding of Unit Testing, Integration Testing, UI Testing, and E2E Testing. Experience debugging asynchronous and flaky test scenarios.
  • CI/CD & Tools: Experience with Bitrise CI, GraphQL, and mocking frameworks like MockingJay.

Nice-to-Have

  • Experience with large-scale iOS applications
  • Knowledge of performance testing
  • Experience with accessibility testing
  • Experience with cloud device farms

Contact: Please share your updated resume with us at hr@simelabs.com.
summary: Seeking an iOS QA Automation Engineer to design and maintain test frameworks, integrate CI/CD pipelines, and collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure application quality.

job_description:
Python Fullstack Developer Role

Responsibilities

  • Data Retrieval & Management: Connect to APIs and SFTP to retrieve data for product activation criteria. Process and store data in a database for application verification.
  • Testing & CI/CD: Write unit/functional tests for code coverage. Implement continuous integration via Jenkins.
  • Containerization: Modify Dockerfiles for improved configuration. Manage Docker deployments for better integration.
  • API Development: Build Flask APIs for application functionalities. Migrate data processing scripts from PHP to Django, adhering to Amadeus standards for Azure cloud migration.

  • Agile Practices: Rotate as Scrum Master to monitor sprints, lead meetings, and report to Astek and Amadeus.

Technologies

  • Backend: Python, PHP, Django, Flask, MySQL, Linux, Docker, Jenkins
  • Frontend: Angular, Node.js, JavaScript, HTML, CSS
  • Cloud & Tools: Azure Cloud, Git, Bitbucket, Jira, Confluence

Contact

For inquiries, email: hr@simelabs.com
summary: Python Fullstack Developer role focusing on data management, backend optimization, frontend development, and Agile practices. Responsibilities include API development, cloud migration, and cross-team collaboration.

This role focuses on leveraging AI tools, automation frameworks, and DevOps to enhance software development, testing, deployment, and productivity. You will collaborate with engineering and product teams to build scalable applications while driving AI-assisted development adoption across the software lifecycle.

  • Conduct code reviews and promote clean coding, security, and performance best practices.

Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, IT, Engineering, or equivalent industry experience.

Salary Package

10–20 LPA

job_description:
Company: Spericorn Technology (P) Ltd Location: Amstor Building, Technopark Phase I, Trivandrum, 695581 Website: http://www.spericorn.com Job Title: AI Engineer - Contract Closing Date: 30 June 2026 Published Date: 01 June 2026 Contact Email: careers@spericorn.com

Brief Description

Spericorn Technology is seeking a highly skilled AI Implementor on a contract basis. The role requires minimum 4 years of hands-on experience in AI/ML engineering, combining technical development with company-wide AI adoption. The ideal candidate must be a builder, strategist, and educator, capable of designing production-grade AI systems while coaching teams and transforming workflows into AI-augmented solutions.

Key Responsibilities

  • Design, build, and deploy end-to-end AI/ML solutions integrated into products and client projects.
  • Develop Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines using vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, pgvector) and LLM backends.
  • Build and maintain Agentic AI systems (autonomous agents, multi-agent pipelines, tool-use frameworks).
  • Implement solutions using Claude (Anthropic), GPT-4, Gemini, and other frontier models via APIs/SDKs.
  • Develop with Cursor AI and AI-native IDEs; leverage GitHub Copilot, Codeium, and similar tools.
  • Build MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers to extend AI capabilities across tools.
  • Architect robust AI infrastructure (prompt engineering, fine-tuning, evaluation frameworks, monitoring).
  • Implement AI-augmented workflows (automated reporting, document processing, code review bots, client communication).

Preferred Skills

  • Proven track record of taking AI projects from ideation to production.
  • Hands-on experience with LLMs, prompt engineering, and fine-tuning (LoRA, RLHF, PEFT).
  • Proficiency in ML frameworks: PyTorch, TensorFlow, Hugging Face Transformers, LangChain, LlamaIndex.
  • RAG architecture expertise: chunking strategies, embedding models, re-ranking, hybrid search.
  • Agentic AI experience: ReAct agents, CrewAI, AutoGen, LangGraph, tool-use, memory systems.
  • Claude (Anthropic API): Claude 3 family, function calling, system prompt design; OpenAI GPT-4/GPT-4o, Azure OpenAI Service.
  • Cursor IDE proficiency: AI-assisted development, inline code generation, refactoring.
  • MCP (Model Context Protocol): Building and consuming MCP servers for tool-augmented LLMs.
  • No-code/low-code AI orchestration: Flowise, Dify, n8n, or similar platforms.

Note: Mention "Application for the post of AI Engineer - Contract" in the email subject.
summary: Spericorn seeks an AI Engineer with 4+ years of experience to design and deploy AI/ML solutions, focusing on LLMs, RAG pipelines, and Agentic AI systems. The role requires hands-on technical development and fostering company-wide AI adoption.

  • Strong understanding of Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) and Software Testing Life Cycle (STLC).

Key Responsibilities

  • Design, develop, test, and maintain cross-platform mobile applications using Flutter and Dart
  • Collaborate with product managers, designers, and backend teams throughout the application lifecycle
  • Implement clean, scalable architectures such as MVVM, Repository Pattern, and Clean Architecture
  • Integrate RESTful APIs, handle JSON parsing, and ensure secure data communication
  • Optimize application performance, responsiveness, and UI/UX consistency across devices
  • Maintain code quality through best practices, reviews, and version control (Git)
  • Manage app releases, including build generation, signing, and deployment to Google Play Store and Apple App Store

Preferred Skills

  • Strong proficiency in Flutter & Dart with production app experience
  • Solid understanding of the mobile application development lifecycle
  • Hands-on experience with HTTP networking, Dio, REST APIs, and secure data handling
  • Experience with state management solutions such as Provider, BLoC, and similar frameworks
  • Strong knowledge of custom widgets, animations, and responsive UI design
  • Proficiency in Git and collaborative development workflows
  • Excellent problem-solving skills with strong attention to detail and code quality

Preferred / Good to Have

  • Exposure to native Android (Kotlin/Java) or iOS (Swift) development
  • Experience with platform-specific integrations and third-party libraries

Qualification

  • B.Tech / B.E / MCA / M.Tech in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field

Interested candidates may forward their detailed resumes to recruiter@kenland.in along with their notice period and current CTC details.
summary: Seeking a Flutter Developer with 2+ years experience to build cross-platform mobile apps using Flutter and Dart. Requires expertise in REST APIs and clean architecture for scalable solutions.

Contact Information

Company: KENLAND IT SOLUTIONS (P) Ltd Address: 3rd & 5th FLOORS, M SQUARED BUILDING, ANNEX 2, TECHNOPARK CAMPUS, KARIYAVATTOM, TRIVANDRUM, KERALA, 695581 Website: https://www.kenland.in Email: recruiter@kenland.in

Job Details

Role: Senior Magento Developer Closing Date: 07, June 2026 Published Date: 30, May 2026 Immediate Joiners Preferred

Brief Description

We are seeking a skilled PHP Laravel Magento Developer with 3-6 years of experience. The ideal candidate will have expertise in PHP, Laravel, and Magento, with a strong background in developing and maintaining web applications and eCommerce platforms. You will work on building high-performance, scalable solutions while ensuring security, reliability, and maintainability.

Key Responsibilities

Magento Development

  • Develop and customize Magento themes and extensions.
  • Configure and maintain Magento e-commerce websites.
  • Implement new features and functionalities based on business requirements.

Backend Development

  • Build and maintain PHP-based applications.
  • Optimize application performance and database queries.
  • Integrate third-party APIs and services with Magento.

Code Quality

  • Write clean, scalable, and well-documented code.
  • Conduct code reviews and optimize legacy code.

Collaboration

  • Work closely with UI/UX designers, front-end developers, and stakeholders.
  • Provide technical solutions and recommendations.

Testing and Maintenance

  • Perform unit and integration testing.
  • Troubleshoot and resolve technical issues in a timely manner.

Preferred Skills & Qualifications

  • Proven experience as a Magento Developer (3+ years preferred).
  • Strong knowledge of PHP, MySQL, and OOP principles.
  • Experience with front-end technologies (HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, jQuery).
  • Familiarity with version control systems (e.g., Git).
  • Knowledge of Magento's architecture, coding standards, and security best practices.
  • Experience in integrating payment gateways, shipping methods, and third-party APIs.
  • Strong debugging and problem-solving skills.
  • Magento Certification (Developer or Solution Specialist).
  • Knowledge of frameworks like Laravel or Symfony.
  • Experience with Docker, Jenkins, or other CI/CD tools.
  • Familiarity with cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP.
summary: Senior Magento Developer with PHP and Laravel expertise to build scalable e-commerce solutions. Requires 3-6 years of experience in Magento, backend development, and API integration.

job_description:

Company: Globcom Solutions (P) Ltd Location: Technopark Phase 3, Thiruvananthapuram Closing Date: 15 June 2026 Published: 30 May 2026 Contact: rajesh@globcomsolution.com

Job Overview

We seek a skilled Web Developer with expertise in WordPress and Shopify to build, customize, and maintain high-performing websites and e-commerce platforms. The ideal candidate will deliver scalable, user-friendly solutions while ensuring optimal performance and functionality.

Key Responsibilities

  • Develop, customize, and maintain websites using WordPress and Shopify
  • Build responsive, user-friendly, and visually appealing websites
  • Customize themes, plugins, and apps based on requirements
  • Manage website updates, backups, maintenance, and security
  • Optimize website performance, speed, and SEO structure
  • Troubleshoot and resolve bugs, errors, and technical issues
  • Integrate third-party tools, APIs, and payment gateways
  • Ensure mobile responsiveness and cross-browser compatibility
  • Collaborate with designers, marketing, and content teams
  • Convert Figma designs into pixel-perfect, responsive websites
  • Improve user experience, landing pages, and conversion performance

Required Skills

  • 3+ years of web development experience
  • Strong expertise in WordPress and Shopify
  • Proficiency in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and PHP
  • Experience with theme and plugin customization
  • Knowledge of WooCommerce, Shopify store management, and e-commerce workflows
  • Understanding of SEO, speed optimization, and responsive design
  • Familiarity with hosting, domains, and basic server/cPanel management
  • Ability to troubleshoot issues independently
  • Experience converting Figma designs into high-quality websites
  • Strong understanding of UI/UX implementation and pixel-perfect development
  • Familiarity with Git is a plus
  • Exposure to or willingness to learn AI tools and workflows
  • Strong communication, attention to detail, and problem-solving skills

Preferred Qualifications

  • Experience in startup or fast-paced environments
  • Familiarity with page builders (Elementor, Divi, WPBakery, etc.)
  • Experience with Shopify app integrations and customization

What We Offer

  • Collaborative and growth-oriented environment
  • Career growth and performance-based promotions

Apply: Share your resume and portfolio at rajesh@globcomsolution.com
